  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \

  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/AbuseFilter \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/AntiSpoof mediawiki/extensions/CentralAuth mediawiki/extensions/CheckUser mediawiki/extensions/CodeEditor mediawiki/extensions/ConfirmEdit mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging mediawiki/extensions/Scribunto mediawiki/extensions/WikiEditor

= install is running: set +x
########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Babel \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CommunityConfiguration
########################################

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Elastica mediawiki/extensions/BetaFeatures mediawiki/extensions/Cite mediawiki/extensions/EventBus mediawiki/extensions/EventStreamConfig mediawiki/extensions/GeoData mediawiki/extensions/PdfHandler mediawiki/extensions/SiteMatrix mediawiki/extensions/TimedMediaHandler

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/EventStreamConfig \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/GeoData \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \

  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Kartographer \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/JsonConfig mediawiki/extensions/FlaggedRevs mediawiki/extensions/ParserFunctions mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/ProofreadPage \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/BetaFeatures mediawiki/extensions/LabeledSectionTransclusion mediawiki/extensions/ParserFunctions mediawiki/extensions/Scribunto mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/TemplateData \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true
########################################
